reviews.comment:

As a member, I think there should be exclusive member-only spaces since you pay high fees, but the staff is very attentive.

reviews.comment:
Solo fue una estación de servicio de paso, que utilice solo para cargar combustible. Le pedí al playero si podía verificar la presión de aire de una cubierta y me dijo "allá tenes la máquina".

(Translated by Google)
It was just a stopover gas station, which I only used to fill up. I asked the attendant if he could check the air pressure of a tire and he said, "The machine's right over there."
